items.description: Tab items. Each: { key, label, icon?, activeIcon?, badge?, disabled?, ariaLabel? }.

activeKey.description: Key of the currently active tab.

onChange.description: Called when a tab is activated.

variant.description: Visual style. 'elevated' replaces the top border with a soft shadow; 'pill' fills the active item; 'floating' renders a detached rounded card.

showLabels.description: When to render the text label for each tab.

safeArea.description: Apply env(safe-area-inset-bottom) so the bar clears the iOS home indicator.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the bar root.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible name for the navigation landmark.
